---
pagetitle: "Michael Lopez | Data & Place"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<!-- Hero Section with 3D Terrain -->
<div class="hero-container">
  <div id="terrain-canvas"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <h1 class="hero-name">Michael Lopez</h1>
    <p class="hero-title">Data Scientist & Place-Based Impact Specialist</p>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-indicator">
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M12 5v14M19 12l-7 7-7-7"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>
<script src="js/terrain.js"></script>

<!-- Introduction Section -->
<section class="intro-section">
  <h2>Mapping Impact, One Community at a Time</h2>
  <p>
    I build data tools and visualizations that help communities understand and transform themselves.
    With a background in nonprofit work and a passion for place-based social impact, I create
    interactive maps, dashboards, and reports that turn complex data into actionable insights.
  </p>
</section>

<!-- Projects Section -->
<section class="projects-section">
  <h2>Featured Work</h2>
  <div class="project-grid">

    <!-- Project Card Template - Duplicate and customize for each project -->
    <article class="project-card">
      <a href="#" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/projects/placeholder.jpg" alt="Project thumbnail" class="project-image" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #8B4D3B 0%, #C4724D 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3 class="project-title">Community Resource Explorer</h3>
          <p class="project-description">
            Interactive map helping residents find local services and resources across the county.
          </p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Shiny</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Maps</span>
            <span class="project-tag">R</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </article>

    <article class="project-card">
      <a href="#" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/projects/placeholder.jpg" alt="Project thumbnail" class="project-image" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #5A7D6B 0%, #8B4D3B 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3 class="project-title">Neighborhood Safety Dashboard</h3>
          <p class="project-description">
            Real-time data visualization tracking safety metrics and trends across neighborhoods.
          </p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Dashboard</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Shiny</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Analysis</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </article>

    <article class="project-card">
      <a href="#" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/projects/placeholder.jpg" alt="Project thumbnail" class="project-image" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #C4724D 0%, #E8C496 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3 class="project-title">Child Poverty Analysis</h3>
          <p class="project-description">
            Comprehensive report exploring childhood poverty patterns and intervention opportunities.
          </p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Report</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Quarto</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Research</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </article>

    <article class="project-card">
      <a href="#" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/projects/placeholder.jpg" alt="Project thumbnail" class="project-image" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #5C4D45 0%, #5A7D6B 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3 class="project-title">Housing Market Explorer</h3>
          <p class="project-description">
            Tool for analyzing housing trends, affordability, and neighborhood change over time.
          </p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Maps</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Shiny</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Housing</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </article>

    <article class="project-card">
      <a href="#" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/projects/placeholder.jpg" alt="Project thumbnail" class="project-image" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #8B4D3B 0%, #C4724D 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3 class="project-title">Community Resource Explorer</h3>
          <p class="project-description">
            Interactive map helping residents find local services and resources across the county.
          </p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Shiny</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Maps</span>
            <span class="project-tag">R</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </article>

    <article class="project-card">
      <a href="#" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/projects/placeholder.jpg" alt="Project thumbnail" class="project-image" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #8B4D3B 0%, #C4724D 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3 class="project-title">Community Resource Explorer</h3>
          <p class="project-description">
            Interactive map helping residents find local services and resources across the county.
          </p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Shiny</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Maps</span>
            <span class="project-tag">R</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </article>

    <!-- Add more project cards as needed -->

  </div>
</section>
```
